chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-905 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 17.09.2025 None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh assisted by Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh assisted by Mr. Zain-ul-Abideen Abbasi, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh a/w Inspector Hussain Ali, S.H.O. P.S. Kanga and SIP Ali Dost on behalf of SSP, Larkana. ------ The police officials, present, file their respective comments, taken on record. Mr. Abdul Rehman A. Bhutto, advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of the petitioner, taken on record. He, however, under the instructions does not press this petition, which is also not opposed by learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh as well as Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Manzoor
